prompt: Optimize the slow 'US Sales Ratio' measure and explain what changed and why, grounded in the Contoso-lite schema.

assertions.text: Replaces the whole-table FILTER(Sales, RELATED('Customer'[Country]) = "United States") with a column predicate 'Customer'[Country] = "United States"
Uses DIVIDE instead of the / operator and removes the redundant IF divide-by-zero guard
Stores the repeated CALCULATE subexpression(s) in VAR so each is computed once
Provides a short list of what changed and why each change is faster or safer
References only columns that exist in the schema
